name: pci-dss
description: PCI-DSS v4.0 rules for code paths handling cardholder data (PAN, CVV, expiry, magnetic-stripe). Layer 2 of the four-layer rubric composition (base + regimes + domain + project).

severity_rules.pattern: Code stores or logs the full Primary Account Number (PAN) in plaintext (matches `\d{13,19}` near payment vocabulary).
severity_rules.description: PCI-DSS Req 3.4 forbids unprotected storage of PAN. Plaintext PAN at rest or in logs is a per-record incident.
severity_rules.remediation: Mask PAN to first-six/last-four for display, tokenise for storage, and remove PAN from log payloads entirely.

severity_rules.pattern: CVV / CVC / sensitive authentication data persisted to a database, log, or cache after authorisation.
severity_rules.description: PCI-DSS Req 3.2 prohibits storage of sensitive authentication data after authorisation, even if encrypted.
severity_rules.remediation: Discard CVV immediately after authorisation; never persist or log; treat CVV in memory as toxic data with shortest-possible lifetime.

severity_rules.pattern: Service handling cardholder data shares a network segment with non-CDE workloads without an explicit allow-list firewall rule.
severity_rules.description: PCI-DSS Req 1 requires segmentation between the cardholder data environment (CDE) and other systems.
severity_rules.remediation: Place CDE workloads in a dedicated VPC/subnet; enforce ingress/egress allow-lists at the boundary.

severity_rules.pattern: HTTP server or outbound HTTP client allows TLS < 1.2 (e.g., `tls.minVersion = 'TLSv1'`) on a CDE path.
severity_rules.description: PCI-DSS Req 4.1 requires TLS 1.2 or higher with strong cryptography for cardholder data in transit.
severity_rules.remediation: Pin minimum TLS to 1.2 (prefer 1.3); disable deprecated ciphers (RC4, 3DES, CBC-mode SHA1).

severity_rules.pattern: Endpoint or service touching cardholder data has no role-based access check or grants broad roles (e.g., `admin: *`).
severity_rules.description: PCI-DSS Req 7 requires need-to-know and least privilege on CDE access.
severity_rules.remediation: Enforce role-based access at the endpoint; require explicit role grants tied to job function for CDE paths.

severity_rules.pattern: CDE code path mutates or reads cardholder data without emitting a structured audit-log entry (actor, action, resource, timestamp).
severity_rules.description: PCI-DSS Req 10 requires an audit trail for every access to cardholder data and admin action.
severity_rules.remediation: Emit an audit-log line on every CDE read/write; ship to an append-only log store with integrity monitoring.

severity_rules.pattern: Dependency manifest pins a library with a known CVE (CVSS >= 7) older than 30 days without an exception ticket.
severity_rules.description: PCI-DSS Req 6.3 requires a documented vulnerability-management program with timely patching.
severity_rules.remediation: Upgrade the dependency or document a compensating control; track via a tagged exception ticket.
